codeReview.summary: Pass. Commit `6adc392` fully closes the three targeted blockers from `frontend-tabbed-layout` and `frontend-health-viz`: `TxHistoryList` now renders above `TabNav` in `dualvm/src/App.tsx:125-131`, `extractAmount()` strips grouping commas before Max values reach `parseUnits()` in `dualvm/src/components/sections/WritePathSection.tsx:22-24,414-435,521-543`, and `dualvm/src/App.tsx:41-46` now auto-syncs the observer address to the connected wallet so Borrow/Repay Max defaults to the active signer. The fix does not resolve either prior `lending-router` blocker: `dualvm/contracts/LendingRouter.sol:49-60` still deposits collateral under the router's own position, and the canonical manifest at `dualvm/deployments/polkadot-hub-testnet-canonical.json:65-77` still has no `contracts.lendingRouter` entry, so the shipped UI still hides the 1-click path. I did not find a new blocking or non-blocking regression in the fix commit itself.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review reports, the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, shared-state docs, and the touched frontend files. Result: pass. The rerun closes the tabbed-layout and health-viz blocking issues called out in scrutiny, but it does not fix either outstanding lending-router blocker, so those remain unresolved for milestone synthesis.
